speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning . Craftsman Company . Can I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , good morning . This is Mr . Suzuki from Video TV . May I speak to Mr . Johnson ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sorry , but Mr . Johnson is out at the moment . Can I take a message ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Uh , yes , okay . Tell him John Suzuki called . That's S-U-Z-U-K-I .

speaker: speaker2
text: Tell him I telephoned . I'd like to see him about the videotapes . Can he call me this afternoon ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , Of course . What's your telephone number ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Extension 162 . Okay , Mr . Suzuki . I'll give him the message .
